title: Sefer Yetzirah combinatorial structures mapped to QA

witnesses.text: Twenty-two Foundation Letters: He placed them in a circle like a wall with 231 Gates. The Circle oscillates back and forth.
witnesses.note: 231 factors through both partition elements (3 and 7)

claims.label: Factorial computation: earliest known systematic treatment

witnesses.text: Two stones build 2 houses / Three stones build 6 houses / Four stones build 24 houses / Five stones build 120 houses / Six stones build 720 houses / Seven stones build 5040 houses
witnesses.qa_note_24: 4! = 24 = QA applied modulus = pi(9) = min Pisano FP
witnesses.qa_note_convergence: dr(n!) converges to 9 for n >= 6 (all n! divisible by 9 for n >= 6)
witnesses.textual_error: Some manuscripts give 6! = 620 instead of 720 — scribal error

witnesses.qa_mapping: 3 = triune (singularity residue); 7 = septenary (Iverson Iota interior); 12 = zodiac (mod-12 pitch class)
witnesses.source: Sefer Yetzirah chapters 3, 4, 5; Hayman 2004 critical edition

claims.label: Oscillating circle: cyclic structure on 22 elements

witnesses.text: The Circle oscillates back and forth
witnesses.structure: Z/22Z vertex set with complete graph K_22
witnesses.cyclical_embedding: Their end is imbedded in their beginning and their beginning in their end
witnesses.qa_note: Cyclic structure is the natural topology for modular arithmetic; the oscillation suggests generator action on the cycle

witnesses.claim: Pythagoras learned geometry in Egypt and number theory in Canaan
witnesses.mount_carmel: Pythagoras spent time at Mount Carmel in sacred pursuits
witnesses.carmel_tradition: Center for mystical retreats since Prophet Elijah (900-849 BCE) — meditation, astrology, numerology
shared_features: abstract number manipulation independent of practical uses
oral and secret transmission of knowledge
reverential attitude toward numbers and their properties

witnesses.method: Systematic cycling through all arrangements of letter subsets
witnesses.group: Permutation group S_n acting on n-letter subsets of the 22 Hebrew letters
witnesses.factorial_connection: Sefer Yetzirah 4:16 counts |S_n| = n! for n=2..7
witnesses.qa_mapping: Group action on discrete state space; QA generator T acts on (b,e) pairs analogously
witnesses.source: Idel, Language Torah and Hermeneutics in Abraham Abulafia, SUNY Press 1989

falsifiers.description: If the 231 gates were C(22,3) = 1540 instead of C(22,2) = 231, the text would be wrong
falsifiers.check: gate_count must equal n*(n-1)/2 for n=22, not n*(n-1)*(n-2)/6

sources: Hayman, Sefer Yesira: Critical Edition, Mohr Siebeck (2004)
Idel, Language Torah and Hermeneutics in Abraham Abulafia, SUNY Press (1989)
Kaplan, Sefer Yetzirah: The Book of Creation, Weiser Books (1991)
Eco, The Search for the Perfect Language, Blackwell (1993)
